name: lightroom-mcp
description: Bridge AI assistants to Adobe Lightroom Classic — search, organize, develop, export.
long_description: Connects AI assistants to a running Adobe Lightroom Classic instance via a bundled Lua plugin. Tools cover catalog search, collections, ratings, keywords, raw develop settings, snapshots, undo/redo, sync settings, import and export. The Lightroom plugin is auto-installed into Lightroom's Modules folder on first run; restart Lightroom once after install to load it.

tools.name: search_photos
tools.description: Search the catalog by filename, keywords, rating, or date.

tools.name: get_selected_photos
tools.description: Photos currently selected in Lightroom (or the filmstrip).

tools.name: get_photo_metadata
tools.description: Detailed EXIF + develop metadata for a photo.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all collections and collection sets.

tools.name: create_collection
tools.description: Create a new collection.

tools.name: add_to_collection
tools.description: Add photos to an existing collection.

tools.name: set_keywords
tools.description: Add or remove keywords on photos.

tools.name: set_rating
tools.description: Set star rating on photos.

tools.name: import_photos
tools.description: Import photos into the catalog.

tools.name: export_photos
tools.description: Export photos with format/quality/dimensions.

tools.name: list_develop_presets
tools.description: List available Develop presets.

tools.name: list_develop_setting_keys
tools.description: List stable Develop keys, known raw keys, quick-develop operations, and controller methods.

tools.name: get_develop_settings_raw
tools.description: Read the full raw Lightroom SDK Develop settings table for a photo.

tools.name: set_develop_settings_raw
tools.description: Write raw Lightroom SDK Develop setting key/value pairs to photos.

tools.name: adjust_develop_settings
tools.description: Apply relative numeric deltas to Develop settings on photos.

tools.name: apply_develop_preset
tools.description: Apply a Develop preset to photos.

tools.name: create_develop_snapshot
tools.description: Create Develop snapshots for photos.

tools.name: copy_develop_settings
tools.description: Copy Develop settings from one photo to others.

tools.name: apply_develop_settings_to_selected
tools.description: Copy Develop settings from a source or selected photo to other selected photos.

tools.name: set_develop_settings
tools.description: Set Develop settings directly on a photo.

tools.name: quick_develop
tools.description: Call Lightroom quick-develop operations on photos.

tools.name: undo_last_mcp_develop_edit
tools.description: Restore settings captured before the last MCP-initiated Develop edit.

tools.name: lightroom_undo_status
tools.description: Report Lightroom global undo/redo availability.

tools.name: lightroom_undo
tools.description: Call Lightroom global undo.

tools.name: lightroom_redo
tools.description: Call Lightroom global redo.

tools.name: develop_controller_call
tools.description: Call raw LrDevelopController methods for the current Develop photo.

request_port.title: Plugin request port
request_port.description: TCP port the Lightroom plugin listens on for requests. Must match the Plug-in Manager setting.

response_port.title: Plugin response port
response_port.description: TCP port the Lightroom plugin sends responses on. Must match the Plug-in Manager setting.
